tests.scenario: Access premium content during free trial
tests.expected_result: The user can access premium content without payment for at least 7 days
tests.notes: Updated trial duration and simplified steps to match hybrid requirement

tests.expected_result: All costs billing frequency and renewal terms are displayed before confirmation
tests.notes: Rewritten to remove JSON output and ensure clarity and testability

steps: Log in with an active subscription
tests.expected_result: The user can cancel the subscription within 3 steps

steps: Open the app without a subscription
tests.expected_result: At least 10 content items are accessible without payment
tests.notes: Resolved conflict between 10 and 20 items from automated tests

tests.expected_result: Audio plays continuously for at least 2 hours without unexpected interruption under normal conditions
tests.notes: Replaced unrealistic overnight test with practical duration

steps: Enter a keyword in the search bar
tests.expected_result: The system returns relevant content results ordered by relevance
tests.notes: Removed unsupported timing and JSON format constraints

steps: Navigate from home screen to content

tests.scenario: Identify free and premium content labels
tests.expected_result: Each content item is labeled as free or premium
tests.notes: Clarified expected result to remove ambiguity

tests.expected_result: No more than one upgrade prompt appears during the session
tests.notes: Refined to make intrusive behavior measurable

steps: Perform actions such as play pause and navigation
tests.expected_result: The app does not crash during at least 95 percent of sessions
tests.notes: Rewritten to align with measurable stability requirement
